# wharf-mobile

React Native + Expo companion app for Wharf. A direct-token client (like the TUI)
that reuses the wharf-web TS crypto layer with native primitives. See `docs/PLAN.md`
for the full milestone plan; M0 (this scaffold) delivers the tab shell only.

## Conventions (auto-synced from the agents KB — do not edit the copies)

@docs/conventions/AGENT.md
@docs/conventions/REACT.md
@docs/conventions/AUTH.md
@docs/conventions/TOOLS.md
@docs/conventions/wharf.md

To change a convention, edit the source in `~/projects/agents` and re-run
`scripts/sync-conventions.sh` — never edit files under `docs/conventions/`.

## Commands

- `bun install` — install dependencies (Bun is the package manager; `bun.lock` is committed).
- `bun run dev` — start Metro with the dev-client (`expo start --dev-client`).
- `bun run ios` / `bun run android` — build + run on a simulator/device (`expo run:*`).
- `bun run typecheck` — `tsc --noEmit`.
- `bun run lint` / `bun run lint:fix` — Biome.
- `bun run test` — Jest (jest-expo + React Native Testing Library).
- `bun run gen:api` — regenerate the Orval API client from `openapi.json`.

## Layout

- `app/` — expo-router routes (`_layout.tsx` providers → `(tabs)/` the 4-tab bar).
- `src/` — `api/` (axios + generated client), `store/` (Redux Toolkit), `query/`
  (TanStack Query), `i18n/` (typed resources), `components/`, `features/<screen>/`
  (co-located logic hooks), `theme/`, `lib/`, `auth/`.
- Native `ios/` & `android/` folders are generated by `expo prebuild` (CNG) and are
  git-ignored — `app.config.ts` is the source of truth.

## Notes

- Styling is NativeWind v4; tokens live in `tailwind.config.js` (mirrored at runtime
  in `src/theme/colors.ts` for icon/native-config colours).
- Crypto, auth, and sync are NOT in M0 — `src/auth/tokenStore.ts` is an in-memory stub.
